title: Minneapolis Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Minneapolis, with a Z-Score of -3.37. This event has been classified as CRITICAL with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Minneapolis are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The cold snap is expected to continue, with a high humidity level of 70% and a wind speed of 5.4 km/h. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 12.8 GG, indicating a high demand for heating energy.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this cold snap.
